records.question: Which Boeing 727 aircraft have a distance of at least 1504 and are linked to Lisa Walker, whose salary is exactly 256481?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
JOIN employee ON certificate.eid = employee.eid
WHERE aircraft.distance >= 1504 AND employee.name = 'Lisa Walker' AND aircraft.name = 'Boeing 727' AND employee.salary = 256481
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    aircraft.aid
FROM 
    certificate
JOIN 
    employee ON certificate.eid = employee.eid
JOIN 
    aircraft ON certificate.aid = aircraft.aid
WHERE 
    employee.name = "Lisa Walker"
    AND employee.salary = 256481
    AND aircraft.name = "Boeing 727"
    AND aircraft.distance >= 1504

records.gold_sql:

records.question: Which aircraft named exactly "Boeing 737-800" that has related flight and certificate records has a total distance exactly 3383, and has at least one flight to Dallas with a departure date exactly "04/12/2005 11:50", an arrival date exactly "04/12/2005 07:05", a flight distance of at least 1251, and a price of at least 182.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE flight.arrival_date = '04/12/2005 07:05' AND flight.departure_date = '04/12/2005 11:50' AND aircraft.distance = 3383 AND flight.distance >= 1251 AND flight.destination = 'Dallas' AND aircraft.name = 'Boeing 737-800' AND flight.price >= 182.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    a.aid
FROM 
    aircraft a
JOIN 
    flight f ON a.aid = f.aid
JOIN 
    certificate c ON a.aid = c.aid
WHERE 
    a.name = "Boeing 737-800"
GROUP BY 
    a.aid
HAVING 
    SUM(f.distance) = 3383
    AND MAX(CASE WHEN f.origin = "Dallas" 
                 AND f.departure_date = "04/12/2005 11:50" 
                 AND f.arrival_date = "04/12/2005 07:05" 
                 AND f.distance >= 1251 
                 AND f.price >= 182.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1

records.question: Which aircraft named Boeing 727 has a distance of exactly 1504?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
JOIN employee ON certificate.eid = employee.eid
WHERE aircraft.name = 'Boeing 727' AND aircraft.distance = 1504
records.pred_sql:
SELECT aid 
FROM aircraft 
WHERE name = "Boeing 727" 
  AND distance = 1504

records.question: Which aircraft named Piper Archer III have flown at least 520 miles and are linked to employee Milo Brooks with a salary of at least 20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
JOIN employee ON certificate.eid = employee.eid
WHERE aircraft.name = 'Piper Archer III' AND employee.salary >= 20 AND aircraft.distance >= 520 AND employee.name = 'Milo Brooks'

SELECT 
    aircraft.aid
FROM 
    aircraft
JOIN 
    certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
JOIN 
    employee ON certificate.eid = employee.eid
WHERE 
    aircraft.name = "Piper Archer III"
    AND aircraft.distance >= 520
    AND employee.name = "Milo Brooks"
    AND employee.salary >= 20

records.question: Which aircraft have a distance of exactly 6900 and are linked to both flights and certificates?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE aircraft.distance = 6900
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.aid
FROM aircraft a
JOIN flight f ON a.aid = f.aid
JOIN certificate c ON a.aid = c.aid
WHERE a.distance = 6900

records.question: Which aircraft named Boeing 737-800 with a distance of at least 3383 have flights to Dallas on 04/12/2005 11:50 that cost exactly 182.0 and cover at most 1251 miles?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
WHERE flight.distance <= 1251 AND flight.price = 182.0 AND aircraft.name = 'Boeing 737-800' AND flight.departure_date = '04/12/2005 11:50' AND flight.destination = 'Dallas' AND aircraft.distance >= 3383

    AND aircraft.distance <= 1251

    AND flight.departure_date = "04/12/2005 11:50"
    AND flight.price = 182.0

records.question: What aircraft are associated with the employee named Lisa Walker?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
JOIN employee ON certificate.eid = employee.eid
WHERE employee.name = 'Lisa Walker'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.aid
FROM certificate AS T1
JOIN employee AS T2 ON T1.eid = T2.eid
WHERE T2.name = "Lisa Walker"

records.question: Which Boeing 747-400 aircraft flew from Los Angeles to Washington D.C. arriving at 04/12/2005 09:40 with a distance of exactly 2308 miles?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
WHERE flight.origin = 'Los Angeles' AND flight.arrival_date = '04/12/2005 09:40' AND aircraft.name = 'Boeing 747-400' AND flight.destination = 'Washington D.C.' AND flight.distance = 2308

FROM

    AND flight.distance = 2308

records.question: Which aircraft named Airbus A340-300 have a maximum distance of at most 7120?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE aircraft.distance <= 7120 AND aircraft.name = 'Airbus A340-300'

SELECT aid
FROM aircraft
WHERE name = 'Airbus A340-300' AND distance <= 7120

records.question: Which aircraft have recorded flights with a distance of at least 1749, a price exactly 220.98, an arrival date exactly '04/12/2005 08:45', and a destination exactly 'Chicago', have certificates, and have the name exactly 'Airbus A340-300' with a distance exactly 7120?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE flight.distance >= 1749 AND flight.price = 220.98 AND flight.arrival_date = '04/12/2005 08:45' AND flight.destination = 'Chicago' AND aircraft.name = 'Airbus A340-300' AND aircraft.distance = 7120
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.aid
FROM flight f
JOIN aircraft a ON f.aid = a.aid
JOIN certificate c ON a.aid = c.aid
WHERE f.distance >= 1749
  AND f.price = 220.98
  AND f.arrival_date = '04/12/2005 08:45'
  AND f.destination = 'Chicago'
  AND a.name = 'Airbus A340-300'
  AND a.distance = 7120
